title: A look at caregivers for community‐living persons with dementia: Implications for the GUIDE model
authors: Julia G. Burgdorf; Vicki A. Freedman; Jennifer L. Wolff
abstract: Medicare's new Guiding an Improved Dementia Experience (GUIDE) model funds integrated dementia care and related caregiver supports for community‐living persons with dementia (PwD). Caregiver strain is a factor in provider payment and performance.
